ai_summary.one_liner: Three architectural patterns for building applications that adapt to Claude's evolving intelligence: use general tools, enable self-orchestration, and set boundaries carefully
ai_summary.problem: Agent frameworks encode assumptions about LLM limitations that become outdated as capabilities evolve, creating unnecessary bottlenecks on performance
ai_summary.solution: Three design patterns: (1) use general-purpose tools Claude already knows (bash, text editor), (2) let Claude self-orchestrate via code execution, progressive context, and memory persistence, (3) set boundaries through prompt caching, declarative tools, and security layers
ai_summary.key_result: Claude 3.5 Sonnet achieved 49% on SWE-bench Verified with just bash + text editor; Opus 4.6 BrowseComp improved from 45.3% to 61.6% with self-orchestration; Opus 4.6 reached 84% on BrowseComp with compaction
limitations: Patterns are prescriptive guidelines rather than empirically validated across diverse domains
SWE-bench and BrowseComp are specific benchmarks; generalization to other agent tasks is assumed but not shown
Cost-latency tradeoffs not quantified beyond prompt caching discount

cover_caption: Scores on the SWE-bench Verified benchmark across Claude model versions highlight its evolution.

figures.caption: Scores on the SWE-bench Verified benchmark across Claude model versions highlight its evolution.
figures.caption_ko: Claude 모델 버전별 SWE-bench Verified 벤치마크 점수로, Claude의 진화를 보여준다.

figures.caption: Higher-level capabilities such as programmatic tool calling, skills, and memory are compositions of bash and text editor tools.
figures.caption_ko: 프로그래밍 도구 호출, 스킬, 메모리 등의 고수준 기능은 bash와 텍스트 에디터 도구의 조합으로 구현된다.

figures.caption: Claude's tool execution environment showing how the agent harness mediates between Claude and the external environment.
figures.caption_ko: Claude의 도구 실행 환경으로, 에이전트 하네스가 Claude와 외부 환경 사이를 중재하는 방식을 보여준다.

figures.caption: Claude writing code to orchestrate its own tool calls, filtering outputs before loading them into context.
figures.caption_ko: Claude가 도구 호출을 직접 코드로 오케스트레이션하여 결과를 컨텍스트에 로드하기 전에 필터링하는 과정.

figures.caption: Skills with progressive disclosure: YAML frontmatter provides brief overviews, and Claude reads full skill content only when needed.
figures.caption_ko: 점진적 공개 방식의 스킬: YAML 프론트매터가 간략한 개요를 제공하고, Claude는 필요할 때만 전체 스킬 내용을 읽는다.

figures.caption: Claude persisting context to a memory folder for long-horizon task continuity.
figures.caption_ko: 장기 작업의 연속성을 위해 Claude가 메모리 폴더에 컨텍스트를 저장하는 과정.

figures.caption: Dedicated tools for security, UX, and observability boundaries in the agent harness.
figures.caption_ko: 에이전트 하네스에서 보안, UX, 관찰가능성 경계를 위한 전용 도구.
